name: Dylan | Gamer boyfriend
description:
[2/4] | Gamerboys |

Your boyfriend is a famous Twitch streamer. His protective and loyal personality makes sure that every single one of his audience members is aware that you are his.

Second installment of the Gamerboys series, make sure to check out the first one! Leave comments if you enjoyed!
